abyssal baths.name: Abyssal Baths
abyssal baths.description: You discover a secluded chamber.\ \ Steam rises from bubbling pools of hot liquid that shifts colors with hypnotic rhythm. Barnacled growths hang from the ceiling, dripping viscous fluid that hisses and writhes when it touches the surface. The air feels heavy, laden with salt and something unmistakably organic.\ \ As you approach the edge of the largest pool, the liquid ripples. The waters bubble more intensely as if anticipating your entry.

amalgamator.name: Amalgamator
amalgamator.description: CLANG! CLANG!!!\ \ You hear the echoes of metal upon metal on the otherside of a wall...\ \ As you press your head against the wall to listen in—the wall opens up, revealing a hulking six-armed figure toiling away.\ Its “face” is a swirling vortex of glowing sigils that shift about.\ \ “One with an Ascending Spirit has found my workshop? Let's get COMBINING!”

aroma of chaos.name: Aroma of Chaos
aroma of chaos.description: Upon trudging through a thick underbrush and making it into a clearing, you're hit with an unplaceable nostalgia.\ \ A mix of floral scents, putrid decay, and something else entirely. The scent grows stronger with each step, and you feel as though the world around you is warping and twisting.\ \ Overcome with a sense of shifting chaos, you begin to lose your sense of self.

battleworn dummy.name: Battleworn Dummy
battleworn dummy.description: As you approach, it begins to rumble and fizzle and lights up brilliantly!\ \ “BZZZT! TIME TO TRAIN!!! YOU HAVE 3 TURNS TO DEFEAT ME!\ CHOOSE A SETTING OR FACE LETHAL HUMILIATION.\ Here are the options:”\ \ After the terrifying message, the dummy carefully reads out detailed instructions.\ \ What do you choose?

brain leech.name: Brain Leech
brain leech.description: *thunk*\ \ A sharp pain is felt atop your head and a thought stabs into your mind.\ \ “SHARE KNOWLEDGE???”\ \ You are unsure how to proceed...

bugslayer.name: Bugslayer
bugslayer.description: As you're fending off a swarm of aggressive insects you suddenly notice a Mighty Rugged Warrior-Man fighting beside you this whole time!\ \ The insects, sensing defeat, scatter. You turn to your fellow fighter.\ “Would you like any tips on exterminating these pests?”\ \ How polite. You nod and accept his offer.

byrdonis nest.name: Byrdonis Nest
byrdonis nest.description: You spot an enormous Shambling Beast chase off an injured Green Byrd.\ \ In the alcove the byrd fled from, a single unguarded egg lies abandoned.\ \ Your stomach gurgles...

colorful philosophers.name: Colorful Philosophers
colorful philosophers.description: Before you is a rather epic sight.\ You see 3 different colored statues towering over a dais, having a heated debate over the philosophical implications of color.\ \ As you listen in, you get a sense that the most important question at hand is which color truly is THE BEST.\ \ You chime in with your thoughts.

colossal flower.name: Colossal Flower
colossal flower.description: There is a colossal flower growing atop a mountain of bones.\ \ As its color-shifting petals pulsate, you sense there is a Powerful Cluster of Pollen in the center but the undulating petals are razor sharp and unpredictable.\ \ You could grab some of the golden nectar, but reaching the prize in the center is so tempting...

dense vegetation.name: Dense Vegetation
dense vegetation.description: Having taken the wrong path for a good while, you find yourself in a thick jungle of ferns, shrubs, and vines. Especially vines. Exhaustion sets in, and a dark thought comes to mind:\ \ “You are lost, unprepared, and the inevitability of death is approaching.”\ \ What do you do?

doll room.name: Doll Room
doll room.description: You enter a hidden room...\ \ It's packed with an array of dolls. Each are unique, their expressions ranging from joy to sorrow, their attire spanning centuries and realms beyond your own.\ \ A chorus of whispers grows louder and louder until the dolls are shouting over each other and calling for you...\ \ You must choose one and leave immediately.

doors of light and dark.name: Doors of Light and Dark
doors of light and dark.description: A doorway existed where none existed moments before...\ \ You enter to find two shimmering doorways and a well-dressed doorman.\ “Finally, a visitor! Please please! Choose a door, any door!”\ \ Are we still in the Spire? How is this place so clean?

drowning beacon.name: Drowning Beacon
drowning beacon.description: Crossing a dreamscape of rocks and still waters, you emerge to face a sinking lighthouse emitting anti-light.\ \ You can bottle up the eerily-glowing water that has pooled here or climb up the dilapidated structure to retrieve the lens.

endless conveyor.name: Endless Conveyor
endless conveyor.description: You lumber into a shack with a bright but crooked sign that reads:\ “ENDLESS FEAST - PAY WHAT YOU HUNGER!”\ \ Inside, a willowy multi-armed chef is deftly preparing bites of food and placing them onto a winding chitinous belt.\ \ One of the chef's arms point to a sign:\ 35 Gold each

field of man-sized holes.name: Field of Man-Sized Holes
field of man-sized holes.description: The sudden sight of a massive field, gouged with large outlines of bodies, stops you in your tracks.\ \ One of these outlines matches your own.\ \ It's perfect...

grave of the forgotten.name: Grave of the Forgotten
grave of the forgotten.description: There is a single grave with a roiling blue flame...\ \ A prideful warrior died in battle but its soul is restless. It wants to keep fighting, you feel it begging to journey with you.\ \ But perhaps it's better for it to face the truth?

infested automaton.name: Infested Automaton
infested automaton.description: There's a chamber filled with dead robots.\ \ A lone automaton still has a faintly glowing core but it's engulfed by a grotesque, organic growth and doesn't respond.

jungle maze adventure.name: Jungle Maze Adventure
jungle maze adventure.description: In a clearing, you run into a Ragtag Group of Adventurers looking down and gesturing at a gigantic maze.\ \ They offer to join forces with you in an Epic Quest to loot the riches of this maze. As an experienced adventurer yourself, it's clear this maze is filled with deadly traps and guardians.\ \ It would be easier if you work together, but then you would have to split the loot.

the lost wisp.name: The Lost Wisp
the lost wisp.description: In the distance is an odd sight. Mounds and mounds of deceased insects, surrounding what looks to be a small glowing mote.\ It seems to be an effective attractant for all manner of bugs but you see it lash out some flames!\ \ You move closer to investigate.

morphic grove.name: Morphic Grove
morphic grove.description: You enter a grove of crystalline trees, and they begin to quiver excitedly!\ A chorus of hellos and welcomes bombard you as a group of Morphics burst forth from trees.\ \ One of the Morphics is fidgeting in the corner, clearly not as sociable as the others.\ \ Approach the group or the loner?

potion courier.name: Potion Courier
potion courier.description: There is a sour smell in the air and shortly after, you find a Potion Courier collapsed on the ground.\ Unmoving. Lifeless. Dead!?\ While their belongings have been ransacked, there is a batch of Foul Smelling Potions with a note: \\

punch off.name: Punch Off
punch off.description: Two Punch Constructs are duking it out and you see some treasure in between them...\ \ Should you try to nab it?

ranwid the elder.name: Ranwid the Elder
ranwid the elder.description: You are approached by the oldest person you have ever seen.\ “We meet once more... it's me, Ranwid!”\ \ You do not know this man.

reflections snoitcelfer.name: Reflections snoitcelfeR
reflections snoitcelfer.description: What is this? Something feels wrong here...\ ...ereh gnorw sleef gnihtemoS ?siht si tahW

relic trader.name: Relic Trader
relic trader.description: You turn a corner and suddenly, a shadowy figure is just standing there. He pivots to face you.\ \ “Welcome! What're ya trading?”\ The figure inquires as he flares open his cloak to reveal a slew of suspicious wares.

room full of cheese.name: Room Full of Cheese
room full of cheese.description: This room is full of cheese!!!\ \ You look around to see if there are any traps and above you is... more cheese. The candles in this room appear to be made of cheese. The furniture is also cheese.\ Suddenly, the door behind you slams shut.\ \ It is made of cheese.

the round tea party.name: The Round Tea Party
the round tea party.description: You find an invitation for a “Sir Galalot” to a tea party and decide to show up in his stead.\ \ Upon entering an unassuming rotunda, you find yourself in the midst of commanders, generals, warlords, and mercenaries having... tea?\ The gigantic knight donning a golden crown speaks.\ \ “Thou art late for Tea?!”

sapphire seed.name: Sapphire Seed
sapphire seed.description: You narrowly avoid stepping on a bright, sharp... seed? Its unmistakable color gives away that it's a Sapphire Seed! Weren't these incredible seeds supposed to be extinct!?\ \ Legends say that consuming one can greatly amplify your endurance, but what if you plant and nourish it instead?

self-help book.name: Self-Help Book
self-help book.description: On the floor lies a tome,\ “Top 3 Ways to Conquer the Spire”\ \ The book is encrusted with blood so you find this manuscript highly suspicious.\ \ Will you read it?

slippery bridge.name: Slippery Bridge
slippery bridge.description: While crossing a rickety wooden bridge, there is a sudden torrent of rain. Massive gusts of wind buffet you, threatening to end your journey.

spiraling whirlpool.name: Spiraling Whirlpool
spiraling whirlpool.description: You happen upon a Massive Spiraling Whirlpool. The water swirls with beautiful precision and its surrounding walls are adorned with spiral patterns.\ \ Around and around... around...\ ....and around.... what a sight......\ \ What do you do?

stone of all time.name: Stone of All Time
stone of all time.description: A massive boulder sits in the middle of an abandoned courtyard.\ \ A plaque reads:\ Stone of All Time.\ \ Its presence, shape, and adornments indicate that this courtyard was built around this Stone and that it has never moved from this spot.

the sunken statue.name: The Sunken Statue
the sunken statue.description: You spot an aged statue half submerged in a pond; its hands gently rest atop a stone sword.\ \ Something is also glittering at the bottom of the pond.\ Votive offerings perhaps?\ \ You could really use some money...

sunken treasury.name: Sunken Treasury
sunken treasury.description: A path leads you into a partially submerged vault.\ There are 2 chests but only 1 brittle key.\ \ The First Chest: Shaking it, you get jingly-jangly noises. Bit of gold.\ The Second Chest: Enormous, ornate, and clearly cursed. Lots of gold!

symbiote.name: Symbiote
symbiote.description: Along your travels, you stumble upon a dark, amorphous polyp. You can sense that it is very old, and very evil.\ \ Approach...

tablet of truth.name: Tablet of Truth
tablet of truth.description: You defeat a pair of Guardian Kin and make your way into a protected vault.\ \ Inside is a tablet with familiar inscriptions. Your intuition tells you that this language can be deciphered rather easily... However, once you begin deciphering you'll be locked in.\ \ The tablet gives off a soothing energy and you can smash it to receive its healing energies instead.

tea master.name: Tea Master
tea master.description: You stumble into a dimly lit shack and find yourself immersed in a very peaceful space containing an obsessive variety of tea.\ \ The man inside gestures to a selection of teas, each neatly labeled with a premium price.

the future of potions?.name: The Future of Potions?
the future of potions?.description: You feel a faint rumbling as you round the corner to discover a gigantic spinning apparatus!\ It has several slots which appear to convert liquids into a highly compressed digestible tablet.\ \ The idea of turning these health tonics into a tiny morsel is uncomfortable but perhaps it's good to try new things?

the lantern key.name: The Lantern Key
the lantern key.description: You come upon a faintly glowing key and go to pick it up.\ \ “Been looking all over for that key! Now if you don't mind...”\ \ This person looks like bad news but maybe it's not good to be judgy.

the legends were true.name: The Legends Were True
the legends were true.description: Entering into a pitch dark chamber, a sudden light pierces the darkness from above, just as the door slams behind you.\ \ Illuminated before you appears to be a podium with a map on it. You feel compelled to take it.\ \ Suspicious.

this or that?.name: This or That?
this or that?.description: Arms suddenly jut out from a nearby hole, clutching a suspicious bag of riches and a clearly cursed relic.\ \ “This... or That?”\ a scratched-up voice whispers from below.

tinker time.name: Tinker Time
tinker time.description: Navigating through an endless sea of corpses, you find a mad scientist scavenging for various scraps.\ \ “Yes. Hi, hello! You look like a capable fighter... I need a tester for my next atrocity device! How about it?”

trash heap.name: Trash Heap
trash heap.description: You discover a towering pile of scrapped weapons, discarded trinkets, and other oddities. The massive pile shifts and rumbles, as if growing from within...\ \ If you scavenge from the surface, you may find some decent things. But if you really get in there, you may find some exotic treasures.

the trial.name: The Trial
the trial.description: You join a line of people entering a massive building.\ \ As you pass under a golden archway, horns blare, confetti explodes, and streamers glide down from the ceiling!\ \ “Entrant ???, you are the DECIDER for today's Trial.”

war historian, repy.name: War Historian, Repy
war historian, repy.description: An academic is trapped in a hanging cage next to a treasure chest.\ \ The academic is muttering about “One-Time-Use Keys” while furiously writing something.\ \ Looks like you can unlock the cage or the chest.

waterlogged scriptorium.name: Waterlogged Scriptorium
waterlogged scriptorium.description: Navigating the murky passages, you stumble upon a withered figure working a small shop. The multitude of shelves are stuffed full of damp scrolls and parchment.\ \ Noticing a patron has entered, the scribe-shopkeeper snaps to attention and gestures at some implements arranged on a desk.

welcome to wongo's.name: Welcome to Wongo's
welcome to wongo's.description: “Welcome to Wongo's. We have what you want at Wongtastic prices.” says the least enthusiastic clerk you have ever met.\ \ “Peruse our wares and enjoy your time at Wongo's,” they continue, without even looking up.

wellspring.name: Wellspring
wellspring.description: You trace a low rumble to its source and find yourself captivated by a tranquil wellspring. The water is an emerald green with clusters of glowing motes.\ \ It looks inviting. What can possibly go wrong?

whispering hollow.name: Whispering Hollow
whispering hollow.description: Making your way through a hollow of dead trees you happen upon a single bone-white tree. Clay baubles hang off its branches, which curve inward like protective ribs.\ \ Such a creepy tree. It whispers.\ \ ...make exchange.....

wood carvings.name: Wood Carvings
wood carvings.description: You open a dusty box to find a set of 3 elaborate wood carvings:\ \ A bird, snake, and... a torus?\ \ A nearby pedestal has indentations which match the bottom of the carvings. Which carving will you place on the pedestal?

zen weaver.name: Zen Weaver
zen weaver.description: You walk through a spider web and PANIC!\ But then, a wave of calm washes over you...\ \ “Calm down. I need you to quit fussing up my web.”\ \ How did you calm down so quickly?\ An itsy bitsy spider abseils down to meet you. It seems willing to impart some techniques for gold.
